remarks: This historic Greens Farms acreage was once part of the famed Winfromere Stables where Edward T. Bedford's world class trotters were kept in grand style. Offering over 220 feet of broad frontage on private Bedford Drive, this scenic 1.14 acre parcel features a gentle rise above the street level, providing an ideal setting for a light filled home. Mature, statuesque trees grace the open landscape, offering established character and picturesque summer shade. City water and electricity are already on the property. This is a prime canvas for you to bring your vision to life in one of Connecticut's most sought-after neighborhoods.
